San Diego, California

The Art of
Paper Folding

A community of origami enthusiasts bringing people together through the joy of folding since the early 1990s.

Explore the Group
Next Meeting First Saturday of Every Month Update time · Zoom
Join Us
Welcome

What is the Greater San Diego Origami Group?

We are a community of paper folders based in San Diego, California — brought together by a shared love of origami in all its forms. From simple cranes to complex tessellations, from seasoned artists to first-time folders, everyone has a place here.

Learn About Us

Everyone is welcome.
No experience necessary.

What We Do

A Community
Built on Folds

From monthly meetups to museum exhibitions, our members share a deep love for paper.

Monthly Meetings

We gather virtually every first Saturday to fold together, share techniques, and welcome newcomers of all skill levels.

Find a meeting →

Community Exhibits

Our members have shown work in galleries and museums, including the celebrated Origami Masterworks at Mingei International.

See the gallery →

Instruction & Learning

Curated links to diagrams, video tutorials, and resources for all levels — from first crane to complex tessellation.

Browse resources →

Member Spotlights

Celebrating the incredible work of our members — from traditional forms to innovative contemporary designs.

Meet our folders →
Photography

The Work

View Full Gallery
Stay Connected

Join Our Mailing List

Get meeting reminders, event announcements, guest folder news, and origami updates delivered straight to your inbox. We send just enough to keep you informed — never enough to be annoying.

  • Monthly meeting reminders with Zoom link
  • Announcements about special events and guest folders
  • Convention news from the origami world
  • Occasional highlights from our members

Mailchimp signup form goes here.
See comment in HTML for setup instructions.
